events.label: reasoning
events.text:
我们被问到："T-tapping on Class B circuit"，这是一个故障诊断。在火灾报警系统中，Class B电路（Style B）不允许T-tapping，因为T-tapping会导致开路故障时无法正确定位故障。根据NFPA 72，Class B电路应使用终端电阻（EOLR）在最后一个设备上，且线路是串联的。T-tapping是分支连接，这在Class B中是不允许的，会导致监控问题。因此这很可能是一个安装缺陷（非合规）。工作阶段是in-service，所以这是已经投入运行的资产。组件条件可能是"non-compliant"或"installed-defective"。故障可能是T-tapping导致电路监控失效。决策应为fail，风险可能高或中等，但考虑到火灾报警系统，可能是高或关键。让我们思考：T-tapping降低了电路的可靠性，可能使某些设备在断线时不被监控，从而在火灾时无法发出警报，这是严重问题。所以decision: fail, risk: high或critical。component_conditions: ["non-compliant"]。percent_complete: 100（因为是in-service），value: 0。findings: "T-tapping on Class B fire alarm circuit is not allowed per NFPA 72; it compromises circuit integrity and monitoring." actions: "Remove T-taps and rewire as a continuous Class B circuit with end-of-line resistor." rationale: 简要说明。references: NFPA 72相关章节，比如NFPA 72-2019 12.3.7或类似。我们不需要具体章节号，但可以提及。confidence: 高。

输出JSON。注意不要markdown前缀。直接输出JSON。

因此：
```json
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "critical",
  "work_stage": "in-service",
  "component_conditions": ["non-compliant"],
  "percent_complete": 100,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.99,
  "event_time": 0,
  "rate": 0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": ["T-tapping on Class B fire alarm circuit violates NFPA 72, compromising supervision and fault detection."],
  "actions": ["Remove all T-taps and rewire devices in series with end-of-line resistor to achieve Class B compliance."],
  "rationale": "NFPA 72 prohibits T-tapping on Class B circuits because it defeats the ability to detect and locate open-circuit faults, leaving portions of the circuit unsupervised.",
  "references": ["NFPA 72 Chapter 12, Class B wiring requirements"]
}
```

确保confidence是浮点数。没问题。

events.label: response
events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "critical",
  "work_stage": "in-service",
  "component_conditions": ["non-compliant"],
  "percent_complete": 100,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.99,
  "event_time": 0,
  "rate": 0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "T-tapping on Class B fire alarm circuit violates NFPA 72, compromising supervision and fault detection."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Remove all T-taps and rewire devices in series with end-of-line resistor to achieve Class B compliance."
  ],
  "rationale": "NFPA 72 prohibits T-tapping on Class B circuits because it prevents proper supervision, allowing open-circuit faults to go undetected and rendering portions of the circuit inoperative during a fire.",
  "references": [
    "NFPA 72 Chapter 12, Class B wiring requirements"
  ]
}
